nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 瓜納卡斯特山脈
nodes.summary: 瓜納卡斯特山脈是哥斯達黎加的山脈，位於該國北部，毗鄰與尼加拉瓜接壤的邊境，全長110公里，最高點海拔高度2,028米，該山體在第四紀形成。

nodes.name: Dull-mantled antbird
nodes.summary: Dull-mantled antbird（Dull-mantled antbird，学名 Sipia laemosticta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于瓜納卡斯特山脈、常綠森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica on the Caribbean slope from the Cordillera de Guanacaste south at elevations between

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | page =368 }} At least one sighting has been documented in extreme northwestern Colombia. The species primarily inhabits the floor and understorey of wet foothills evergreen forest and also occurs in lowlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered fairly common in Costa Rica and in eastern Panama though patchily distributed across its range. It is "[c]onsidered to be of high sensitivity to disturbance, and, in view of its small geographical range and narrow elevational limits, this species should be monitored for signs of decline."
